message:
fix: derive rig name from cwd in runDone instead of calling findCurrentRig

findCurrentRig calls os.Getwd() which fails when the working directory
is deleted (e.g., worktree nuked by Witness). This made all the
deleted-worktree fallback logic unreachable. Now derives rig name from
the already-computed cwd (which has fallback to GT_POLECAT_PATH), with
GT_RIG env var as last resort.

Fixes gt-avv1e

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
